ground_truth.title: Travel Weekly Hotel and Resort News and Feature Articles: Travel Weekly
ground_truth.main_content: Hotel News Articles: Guestroom remodel is completed at MGM Grand Las Vegas - The redesign was done to give the rooms a brighter, airier feel and added features like walk-in showers, lighted closets and... Ocean Signature Resorts debuts adults-only Ocean Allure Costa Mujeres - The all-inclusive property features upscale suites with a wide range of dining options. When does Jamaica expect tourism to fully recover? Not until after 2026 - Jamaica tourism officials attending a New York event said they expect visitor arrivals will rebound to approximately 80% of... Exclusive Resorts is acquiring luxury vacation club Inspirato - Inspirato will be taken private in the $59 million all-cash transaction. Restored Swiss hotel Chesa Marchetta will open in January - The seasonal property in the Engadin Valley, not far from the Italy border, consists of 13 rooms, a three-bedroom rental house... Grand Canyon South Rim hotels reopen after water line repair - The National Park Service had closed the hotels on Dec. 6 due to a series of breaks in the Transcanyon Waterline. Spain fines Airbnb for advertising unlicensed rentals - Airbnb said that it plans to challenge the fine in court. Turks and Caicos resort to be part of Hilton's LXR collection - Amaris Grace Bay is expected to open in 2028 along Grace Bay Beach. The Last Resort: Saffire Freycinet and Flockhill Lodge - Karen Urosevich, founder of Well Placed Travel, offers tips on navigating off-the-beaten-path destinations and talks about... Suppliers, sellers, pavilions and pinky promises at ILTM - Although she is only in her fourth year as a travel advisor, Stacy King has made an impression on luxury suppliers.
with: Guestroom remodel is completed at MGM Grand Las Vegas - The redesign was done to give the rooms a brighter, airier feel and added features like walk-in showers, lighted closets and...
Ocean Signature Resorts debuts adults-only Ocean Allure Costa Mujeres - The all-inclusive property features upscale suites with a wide range of dining options.

When does Jamaica expect tourism to fully recover? Not until after 2026 - Jamaica tourism officials attending a New York event said they expect visitor arrivals will rebound to approximately 80% of...
Exclusive Resorts is acquiring luxury vacation club Inspirato - Inspirato will be taken private in the $59 million all-cash transaction.
Grand Canyon South Rim hotels reopen after water line repair - The National Park Service had closed the hotels on Dec. 6 due to a series of breaks in the Transcanyon Waterline.

items.alt: A remodeled executive king suite living room at the MGM Grand features walnut finishes and vibrant carpeting.
items.caption: A remodeled executive king suite living room at the MGM Grand features walnut finishes and vibrant carpeting.

items.alt: Ocean Allure Costa Mujeres is an adults-only, all-inclusive resort with swim-up suites and winding water features.
items.caption: Ocean Allure Costa Mujeres is an adults-only, all-inclusive resort with swim-up suites and winding water features.

items.alt: Attending a media event in New York on Dec. 18 were (from left) Donovan White, Jamaica Tourist Board; Jamaica tourism minister Edmund Bartlett; and Philip Rose, Jamaica Tourist Board.
items.caption: Attending a media event in New York on Dec. 18 were (from left) Donovan White, Jamaica Tourist Board; Jamaica tourism minister Edmund Bartlett; and Philip Rose, Jamaica Tourist Board.

items.alt: A Los Cabos villa that is part of Inspirato's network.
items.caption: A Los Cabos villa that is part of Inspirato's network.

items.alt: El Tovar, a hotel on the Grand Canyon's South Rim, has reopened to guests.
items.caption: El Tovar, a hotel on the Grand Canyon's South Rim, has reopened to guests.

items.alt: The Amaris Grace Bay will have 170 rooms, including a number of one- to four-bedroom branded residences.
items.caption: The Amaris Grace Bay will have 170 rooms, including a number of one- to four-bedroom branded residences.

items.alt: Luxury travel advisor Stacy King hugs Access Italy’s Simone Amorico at the International Luxury Travel Market.
items.caption: Luxury travel advisor Stacy King hugs Access Italy's Simone Amorico at the International Luxury Travel Market.

items.alt: Valencia’s city center, Including the famous City of Arts and Sciences complex, was unaffected by the floods.
items.caption: Valencia's city center, Including the famous City of Arts and Sciences complex, was unaffected by the floods.
